query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.email,
  u.dataOrigin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE userId = u.id) as clients_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE userId = u.id) as projects_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE createdBy = u.id) as quotations_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE clientId IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE userId = u.id)) as appointments_count
FROM users u
WHERE u.email IN (
  'admin-bulk-1771708315665@test.com',
  'test-manual-1771708316540@example.com',
  'cliente-bulk@test.com',
  'manual-mix-1771708317396@example.com',
  'manual-quot-1771708318425@example.com'
);
